title: Market Data Gateway - Missing Cross-AZ Failover
description: Market data gateway is deployed in single AZ (us-east-1a) with no automated failover. An AZ outage causes complete feed loss. No manual runbook exists for rapid failover. This is a critical path for all trading operations.

title: Order Router - Retry Storm Risk with Missing Circuit Breaker
description: Order router has exponential retry logic without circuit breaker protection. Downstream timeout causes retry cascade exhausting connection pools. Configuration allows infinite retry loops with exponential backoff starting at 10ms. Risk engine timeout already triggered this in production.
mitigation_gap: No circuit breaker deployed despite incident

title: Risk Engine - No SLO Target Defined
description: Risk engine has no defined SLO, making performance degradation undetectable by alerting systems. Service has 4 critical downstream dependencies and no latency SLA. Missing SLO target (field is null) prevents baseline-aware monitoring.

title: Position Manager - Critical Single Point of Failure
description: Position manager is a critical dependency for 4 Tier-1 services (order-router, risk-engine, trade-execution, settlement-service). It's the only source of truth for current positions. A failure blocks all trading operations. Currently deployed with cross-AZ failover but no multi-region replication.
mitigation_gap: No read replicas in secondary region

title: Portfolio Analytics - No SLO Target Defined
description: Portfolio analytics service has null SLO target, preventing objective performance monitoring. Single AZ deployment with no failover. Tier 2 service but customers depend on daily PnL calculations and portfolio reports.
mitigation_gap: Single AZ, no SLO, no failover

title: Notification Service - Single AZ Deployment No Failover
description: Notification service is deployed in single AZ with no failover. Risk alerts may be delayed or lost during AZ outages. Service currently at 98.76% SLO (below 99% target). No dead letter queue for failed notifications.

title: Settlement Service - No Circuit Breaker on Sync Dependencies
description: Settlement service makes synchronous calls to position-manager and trade-execution without circuit breaker protection. A timeout in either dependency cascades to settlement processing failures. Service had connection pool exhaustion incident 116 days ago.

title: Analytics Dashboard - Single AZ with No Circuit Breaker
description: Analytics dashboard is single AZ deployed with no failover and no circuit breaker on downstream calls. Tier 3 service but operations team depends on it for monitoring. SLO target of 99% but current is 99.12%.
